definitions.geometry_time_ns: Two-way geometric propagation-time estimate; not interchangeable with the visible waveform phase.
definitions.visible_phase_time_ns: Consistently selected visible target phase or envelope feature in the B-scan.
definitions.label_center_ns: Approved training curve after one visible-phase rule is applied to every source.

forbidden_mixture: Geometry-time and visible-phase labels must not be mixed without an explicit, auditable conversion.
